description: Proposed implementation backlog for GL-075 and onward. This backlog is a planning artifact; no implementation is provided by GL-074.

backlogItems.title: Runtime configuration enforcement
backlogItems.goal: Implement the runtime configuration model designed in GL-066, including environment variable parsing, runtime mode detection, and startup validation.
backlogItems.scope: Configuration loading, validation, and fail-fast behavior. No database schema changes unless a config table is explicitly approved.
forbidden_changes: No database schema changes without explicit scope
prerequisites: Full backend suite passes with 0 failures
backlogItems.test_strategy: Targeted tests for config validation edge cases, env override, and fail-fast. Full backend suite must pass.

backlogItems.title: Health / readiness endpoint baseline
backlogItems.goal: Add coarse health and readiness endpoints that operators and future runbooks can use for first-check diagnostics.
backlogItems.scope: HTTP handlers for /health and /ready with lightweight dependency checks and structured responses.
forbidden_changes: No auth enforcement at health endpoints
backlogItems.test_strategy: Targeted tests for health endpoint responses and dependency failure simulation. Full backend suite must pass.

backlogItems.title: Structured logging helper / correlation ID baseline
backlogItems.goal: Introduce a structured logging helper that emits GL-071-compliant events and attaches correlation IDs without changing API behavior.
backlogItems.scope: Logger factory, correlation ID middleware/generator, field catalog compliance, and secret redaction in log output.
forbidden_changes: No rewriting of all existing log statements
backlogItems.test_strategy: Targeted tests for secret redaction, correlation ID generation, and field catalog compliance. Full backend suite must pass.

backlogItems.title: Secret source boundary hardening
backlogItems.goal: Abstract secret retrieval behind a boundary so that demo keys can be replaced by managed secrets without changing consumers.
backlogItems.scope: Secret source interface, environment-based loader, and migration path away from the demo Ed25519 keypair.
forbidden_changes: No full HSM or vault integration unless explicitly scoped
backlogItems.test_strategy: Targeted tests for secret retrieval, fallback behavior, and boundary isolation. Full backend suite must pass.

backlogItems.title: Persistence backend abstraction groundwork
backlogItems.goal: Solidify the persistence backend abstraction so PostgreSQL can be wired in cleanly alongside SQLite.
backlogItems.scope: Database session factory abstraction, connection pool configuration placeholder, and runtime-driven backend selection.
backlogItems.test_strategy: Targeted tests for backend switching and connection error handling. Full backend suite must pass.

backlogItems.title: Deployment / runtime mode validation
backlogItems.goal: Validate that the application refuses to start in an invalid or mismatched runtime mode.
backlogItems.scope: Startup assertions for runtime mode vs. configuration consistency, deployment artifact validation, and graceful failure modes.
backlogItems.test_strategy: Targeted tests for invalid runtime mode rejection and artifact validation. Full backend suite must pass.

backlogItems.title: Operator access hardening
backlogItems.goal: Strengthen operator authentication and authorization boundaries without breaking existing test paths.
backlogItems.scope: Operator role enforcement, token validation improvements, and access boundary checks for sensitive endpoints.
forbidden_changes: No OAuth/JWT/SSO implementation unless explicitly scoped
No breaking changes to existing admin-token paths used by tests
backlogItems.test_strategy: Targeted tests for unauthorized access rejection and authorized access success. Full backend suite must pass.

backlogItems.title: Claude Code review-only checkpoint (security / runtime alignment)
backlogItems.goal: Review-only checkpoint to validate that GL-075 through GL-081 implementations align with design documents and do not introduce forbidden changes.
backlogItems.scope: No code changes. Review diff, test coverage, and rollback feasibility for the first implementation cut.
backlogItems.allowed_files_category: Review comments, planning doc updates only
forbidden_changes: No implementation code changes during this checkpoint
prerequisites: GL-075 through GL-081 design alignment complete
backlogItems.test_strategy: Manual review of diffs, test reports, and rollback plans. No automated tests required.

backlogItems.title: Backup / restore / data lifecycle jobs
backlogItems.goal: Implement automated backup, restore, and data lifecycle jobs based on the GL-072 design.
backlogItems.scope: Scheduled backup jobs, restore procedures, retention automation, and lifecycle state transitions.
forbidden_changes: No overwrite of audit or provenance records
backlogItems.test_strategy: Targeted tests for backup scope, restore integrity, and retention policy enforcement. Full backend suite must pass.

backlogItems.title: Observability metrics and alerting baseline
backlogItems.goal: Extend the structured logging baseline with metrics and alerting thresholds based on the GL-071 design.
backlogItems.scope: Metrics collection, alerting thresholds, and integration with health endpoints.
backlogItems.test_strategy: Targeted tests for metric emission and alerting threshold triggers. Full backend suite must pass.
